description: Runtime contract. Fall-type uses Colab multi-sensor extract (263 raw) + MI(150) + best classifier, saved under models/baseline_falltype/.
enhanced_pipeline: Frozen scalers baseline_fall/scaler_fall.pkl & baseline_adl/scaler_adl.pkl expect 48-D (must match training extraction order used when saving models).
fall_type_pipeline: CompleteFallFeatureExtractor Colab notebook variant → 263-D raw vector (must match training); NOT the repo padded 350-D row unless you retrained with that.
fall_type_model_note: models/baseline_falltype/best_fall_classifier.pkl — winner from Colab (often XGBoost at ~94.8% acc).
